behavior_in_task_description.reason: All file paths, function names (Write-Warn, Write-Step, etc.), literal strings (claude-opus-4.6, 10 * 60, Stop on Environment Blockers, Missing Appium drivers, Device/emulator not available, git checkout HEAD -- ., git clean -fd, CustomAgentLogsTmp), and section requirements are explicitly named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes symptoms and required behavior (e.g., 'add a Write-Warn helper matching pattern') without giving the exact code/diff.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for behavior (function callable, output produced) and required literal strings/commands that the instruction explicitly mandates, allowing multiple valid implementations.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute pwsh subprocess to source shared-utils.ps1 and call Write-Warn, run git commands, and parse PowerShell scripts via AST, in addition to text checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests like test_write_warn_executes require an actual function definition that emits the message; stubs returning None would not satisfy this.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover Write-Warn, host app warning replacements, model rename, post-gate sections, cleanup commands, and android.cake timeout per instruction items 1-6.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with comment dividers (Pass-to-pass static, repo_tests, Fail-to-pass behavioral) and have descriptive names.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task does not produce structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and command names appear consistent and correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files but expects agent to localize edits; this is appropriate scope guidance not line-level hints.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold patch shows localized edits to each agent/config file rather than full rewrites, consistent with instruction's 'edit only what's necessary'.
